behaviors.description: Embedding vector dimensionality matches the configured vector index dimension.
behaviors.justification: A mock embedder can miss real failures like model/version drift (e.g., deployed embedding model changes dimensions) or misconfigured index schema. The true failure boundary is the live embedding service + live index contract.
behaviors.test_description: Run an API test against the deployed embedding provider and real vector DB index metadata: submit a query, capture produced embedding length from the embedding client boundary, fetch index dimension from DB, and assert exact equality. Fail if dimensions differ or if insertion/search rejects the vector.

behaviors.description: Similarity search results are ordered by descending cosine similarity.
behaviors.justification: In-process mocks can incorrectly assume sorted outputs. Real vector engines (ANN indexes, tie-breaking, score normalization) may violate expected ordering under production settings. Need the actual retrieval engine behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Seed a real test index with fixed vectors/documents and query via the API path that executes real similarity search. Collect returned scores and assert monotonic non-increasing order (score[i] >= score[i+1]). Include a fixture with near-ties to catch unstable sort behavior.

behaviors.description: LLM reranker changes ordering for nuanced-intent queries versus raw vector ranking.
behaviors.justification: Correctness depends on real LLM judgment; mocked rerank logic would hide prompt/model behavior failures. Output can vary across runs and model versions, so the real model must be exercised.
behaviors.test_description: Use a curated nuanced query + candidate set where lexical similarity conflicts with intent. Run real reranking (with raw ranking captured before rerank) across repeated trials and assert order differs from raw ranking in a minimum proportion of runs (e.g., >=60%), with a fixed prompt and model version.

behaviors.description: Queries with no close matches return an empty set instead of low-relevance noise.
behaviors.justification: Mocked scores can hide real embedding-space score distributions and threshold calibration issues. Failure usually appears only with the real embedding model + real index scoring behavior.
behaviors.test_description: Populate real index with an in-domain corpus, send out-of-domain/noise queries through the full retrieval path, and assert API returns empty results when top similarity is below configured threshold. Verify no fallback path injects irrelevant documents.

behaviors.description: Median end-to-end query latency (embed + search + rerank + response) is under 2 seconds.
behaviors.justification: Latency is dominated by real network/service/subprocess behavior; mocks systematically hide this. Although an LLM call is present, this is a performance SLO check, not semantic LLM correctness.
behaviors.test_description: Run a production-like load test against the real API with real embedding and rerank providers using representative query mix; record end-to-end latency from request receipt to response send. Assert p50 < 2000 ms over a statistically meaningful sample window.
